---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Write a short and clear description of the bug.

Example: “The search bar crashes when I try to search with an empty input.”

## Steps to Reproduce
Tell us the exact steps we need to follow to see the bug.

1. Go to `...`
2. Click on `...`
3. Type `...`
4. See the error

If the bug happens only sometimes, please describe the situation as clearly as possible.

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened instead?

Example: “The search should show results or display a helpful message.”

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened?

Example: “The page froze and nothing was displayed.”

## Screenshots / Screen Recording
If this bug affects the UI, attach a screenshot or screen recording here.

If not applicable, write:
`N/A`

## Environment
Please share the setup where the bug happened.

- OS: 
- Browser + version: 
- How did you run Dinam? `dev server` / `extension build`
- Commit or branch: 
- Console errors, if any: 

## Additional Context
Add any extra details that may help us understand the issue better.

You can include:
- What you were trying to do
- Whether this happens every time or only sometimes
- Any relevant logs
- Any workarounds you tried

## Checklist
- [ ] I searched existing issues to make sure this bug was not already reported.
- [ ] I can reproduce this on the latest `master`.
- [ ] I included the steps, expected behavior, actual behavior, and environment details.
